# tsshogi (Dart port)

> Japanese shogi (将棋) library for Dart. Port of the TypeScript library
> [sunfish-shogi/tsshogi](https://github.com/sunfish-shogi/tsshogi) plus
> castle / strategy / technique detection ported from
> [akicho8/bioshogi](https://github.com/akicho8/bioshogi). MIT license.

Use the documents below to integrate this package. The single-file
context dump under `docs/llm-context.md` is the recommended starting
point for any LLM coding assistant.

## Setup

- [README.md](README.md): user-facing setup, dependency snippet, license.
- [pubspec.yaml](pubspec.yaml): package metadata (name, version 2.3.2,
  Dart SDK ^3.4.0, dev deps only).

## Comprehensive context (load this first)

- [docs/llm-context.md](docs/llm-context.md): single-file dump intended
  for LLM context. Covers public API, data model, examples, gotchas.

## Public API surface

- [lib/tsshogi.dart](lib/tsshogi.dart): barrel of public exports.
- [lib/src/position.dart](lib/src/position.dart): `Position` /
  `ImmutablePosition` — board, hands, SFEN, doMove, isValidMove,
  legal-move helpers, jishogi scoring, `powerMap` (per-square attack
  counts for both colors, 利き数マップ).
- [lib/src/record.dart](lib/src/record.dart): `Record` /
  `ImmutableRecord` — kifu tree, branches, USI / USEN serialization,
  metadata, events.
- [lib/src/move.dart](lib/src/move.dart): `Move`, `SpecialMove` family,
  `parseUSIMove`, `areSameMoves`.
- [lib/src/board.dart](lib/src/board.dart), [lib/src/hand.dart](lib/src/hand.dart):
  read-only and mutable views of board and hand state.
- [lib/src/square.dart](lib/src/square.dart),
  [lib/src/piece.dart](lib/src/piece.dart),
  [lib/src/color.dart](lib/src/color.dart),
  [lib/src/direction.dart](lib/src/direction.dart): primitives.
- [lib/src/castle.dart](lib/src/castle.dart): castle detection — the
  `CastleRequirement` sealed family (PiecePlacement / AnyOfPieces /
  EmptySquare / NotOfPieces / AnyPiece / PieceAnywhere / HandPiece /
  PieceUnmoved / PieceVisited / KingIgyoku), `detectCastles`,
  `record.castles` extension.
- [lib/src/strategy.dart](lib/src/strategy.dart): strategy detection
  reusing the castle requirement engine. `detectStrategies`,
  `record.strategies`.
- [lib/src/technique.dart](lib/src/technique.dart): tactical pattern
  detection (per-move predicate model). `detectTechniques`,
  `record.techniques`.
- [lib/src/move_history.dart](lib/src/move_history.dart): MoveHistory
  tracker used by history-dependent requirements (outbreak_turn,
  kingFirstMovedTurn, visited squares).

## Data sources (editable)

- [data/castles.txt](data/castles.txt): 113 castle templates (ASCII
  grid + headers). Edit this, regenerate Dart with
  `dart run tool/generate_castles.dart`.
- [data/strategies.txt](data/strategies.txt): 241 strategy templates.
  Regenerate with `dart run tool/generate_strategies.dart`.

## Codegen tooling

- [tool/template_parser.dart](tool/template_parser.dart): ASCII format
  parser (cell tokens, header lines).
- [tool/generate_castles.dart](tool/generate_castles.dart),
  [tool/generate_strategies.dart](tool/generate_strategies.dart):
  ASCII → `lib/src/generated/*.g.dart` generators.
- [tool/import_bioshogi.dart](tool/import_bioshogi.dart): one-shot
  importer reading bioshogi's Ruby source. Names + coordinates only,
  no expression copy.

## Plans / coverage notes

- [docs/plans/tsshogi-dart-port.md](docs/plans/tsshogi-dart-port.md):
  original port plan (what's done / what's deferred to Phase 3+).
- [docs/plans/castle-detection.md](docs/plans/castle-detection.md):
  castle detection design.
- [docs/plans/strategy-technique-detection.md](docs/plans/strategy-technique-detection.md):
  strategy + technique design.
- [docs/technique-coverage.md](docs/technique-coverage.md): per-technique
  status (94 implemented, 43 skipped, ~20 FIXME).

## Optional

- [test/](test/): all test files. Useful as executable examples.
- [bin/check_detection.dart](bin/check_detection.dart): dev script that
  runs detection on sample USIs.

## License

- [LICENSE](LICENSE): MIT (preserves upstream tsshogi copyright).
